name: National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH)
administered_by: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
retrieval_text: Support package for SC/ST entrepreneurs administered through the National SC-ST Hub (FY2021-22 to FY2025-26, total outlay Rs 588 crore): a 25% capital subsidy, capped at Rs 25 lakh, on bank-financed plant, machinery, and equipment under the Special Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme (SCLCSS); reimbursement of up to 80% or Rs 1 lakh, whichever is less, of bank loan processing charges; reimbursement of up to 80% or Rs 1 lakh of Performance Bank Guarantee charges for government tender participation; course-fee reimbursement for management training at NIRF-ranked institutes; and membership-fee reimbursement for government e-commerce portals such as GeM, e-Khadi, and Tribes India. This is a subsidy and reimbursement package layered on top of a separately obtained bank loan, not a direct loan product in itself.
documents_required: SC/ST Caste Certificate of the Proprietor/Major Shareholder
Aadhaar Card of the Proprietor/Key Promoter
Bank Statement of the Business (most recent 6 months)
Business Address Proof (e.g., Electricity Bill, Rent Agreement)
Proof of Constitution of Business (e.g., Partnership Deed, MOA/AOA)
Bank Loan Sanction Letter (for bank-financed components)
Quotation/Proforma Invoice for Plant, Machinery, and Equipment
Cancelled Cheque of the Business Bank Account
